message:
refactor(browser): migrate Node.js tests to Playwright browser tests

- Remove Node.js test files (test/*.test.js)
- Add browser-based unit tests (tests/e2e/unit-tests.spec.js)
- Tests now run in real browser context via page.evaluate()
- Add symlink for src folder to enable module imports in browser
- Update package.json test script to use Playwright

All 220 browser tests pass.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+../../packages/browser/src
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -40,7 +40,8 @@
     "build:js": "node esbuild.config.js",
     "build:legacy": "node scripts/build.js",
     "dev": "node esbuild.config.js --watch",
-    "test": "node --test test/*.test.js",
+    "test": "npx playwright test",
+    "test:e2e": "npx playwright test",
     "prepublishOnly": "npm run build"
   },
   "keywords": [
